indicators.name: concrete floor
indicators.rationale: Concrete floors are cold and hard, making them unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: concrete walls
indicators.rationale: Concrete walls are cold and hard, making them unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: concrete ceiling
indicators.rationale: Concrete ceilings are cold and hard, making them unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or bedding
indicators.rationale: No furniture or bedding indicates no resting surface or support for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and views, essential for circadian alignment.

indicators.name: no lighting
indicators.rationale: No lighting makes it impossible to create a sleep-friendly environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). The hard, cold surfaces and lack of furniture or lighting make it impossible to create a comfortable and supportive environment for sleep.
